title: Alpha Gaia
description: Adds an Alpha 1.1.2-style world-preset through a datapack.
body:
# Alpha Gaia
This is a <u>**data pack**</u> that adds in an <u>Alpha 1.1.2-*style* World Preset</u>. Since this is a data pack, <u>**it will not be a perfect replica**</u>, as many features would require mod changes to do (see **Differences** below). This is just a way to get the Alpha vibes in vanilla.   

**<u>This means Seeds from Alpha will not work</u>**. Use mods like [Moderner Beta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moderner-beta) if you want to do something like that.

The Mod version is simply a package for the data pack and language pack for ease of installing. 

## Notable Additions from Alpha:
- **Mobs**
  - Only mobs from Alpha can spawn *naturally*, examples:
    - Drowned can spawn from transforming a Zombie into one (not a *natual* spawn)
    - Zombie Villagers can't, because they do have separate IDs
    - Baby Zombies can spawn though, as they have the same ID as Zombies
- **Structures**
  - Only Monster Rooms spawn
- **World Features**
  - Only the Foliage from Alpha will spawn
  - Only the Ores from Alpha will spawn

## Differences:
- **World Height**  
  - 256 instead of 128. This is more of a past limitation than a unique old feature
  - W.I.P: Old Height Add-on
- **Nether**  
  - The Alpha 1.2.0 Nether is added to this, despite it not existing in Alpha 1.1.2
- **Caves**  
  - Can generate with water in them due to data pack limitations
    - Less water on the surrounding surface means less water underground
  - Can generate in bodies of water
- **Biome Colors**  
  - Are not identical to Alpha (e.g. grass/water/leaves). I tried my best to sample colors, but the foliage color just isn't coming out the same
- **Stone Basins**   
  - Are not square and glitchy like in Alpha

### These have been adjusted to be close to Alpha, but aren't perfect:
- **Ores**
  - Including deposits, like dirt and clay
- **Cave Generation**
- **Vegetation**
  - Flowers, trees, pumpkins, sugarcane, cacti, etc.
- **Ponds/Lakes/Oceans**
- **Sandy/Gravel "Beaches"**
- **Terrain Shape**

**If you are an Alpha Code fanatic and know of exact spawn rates/probabilities for any of these features, or think you can implement them in a better way, feel free to contribute on the GitHub page or my Discord!**   

Please keep in mind I wish to keep this as a Data Pack, as there are plenty of other projects that seek to do what I'm doing in the form of a mod, like [Moderner Beta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moderner-beta).
